description:
This quiz assesses JavaScript proficiency across ES2015 to ES2022 features, testing knowledge of modern syntax, language enhancements, and best practices. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, offering a casual, encouraging tone that invites learners to gauge their skill without barriers. The format is multiple‑choice and emphasizes practical understanding of recent ECMAScript updates.
Topics: ES2015 (ES6) features, ES2020–ES2022 language enhancements, Modern JavaScript syntax and semantics, Module imports and component usage
Audience: Developers with basic JavaScript experience seeking to validate and expand their knowledge of recent ECMAScript standards.
